items.claim: Conor McGregor secured four takedowns in his 2013 fight against Max Holloway.
items.quote: Conor McGregor got four takedowns in that matchup.

items.claim: The 2013 fight against Max Holloway is the only time in Conor McGregor's career he has recorded more than one takedown in a single fight.
items.quote: I believe that is the only fight in his entire career that he got more than one takedown in one fight.

items.claim: Gable Stevenson has specific technical advantages he can exploit to defeat Alicia Ellison.
items.quote: there might be a couple of loopholes that Gable Stevenson may be able to exploit in Alicia Ellison's game to get the victory.

items.claim: Cody Duran's performance at 125 lbs is a significant factor because he previously looked good at 135 lbs.
items.quote: it's going to be at 125 lbs. And I think that's going to matter because Duran looked really good in his last outing
